name: wpx
description: WPX - AI 智能文档编辑器，多窗口 Electron + Vue3 应用

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "npm --prefix wpx-app run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node electron/run-dev.js"
scripts.electron:dev:multi: concurrently -k "npm --prefix wpx-app run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node electron/run-dev.js --multi"
scripts.electron:build: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm --prefix wpx-app run build && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm --prefix wpx-app run build && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm --prefix wpx-app run build && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:linux: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm --prefix wpx-app run build && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --linux
scripts.electron:pack:win: node scripts/bump-pack-version.mjs print && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm --prefix wpx-app run build && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win && node scripts/bump-pack-version.mjs bump
